title: helianthemum papillare var. pediforme
intro: Helianthemum papillare var. pediforme, also known as Rockrose, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, Rockrose has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it may also help to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Rockrose can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
